name: Death-Triggered Lab — Undead Fortitude & Death Burst (D-MON-4b)
description: Bench for traits that fire as a monster dies. Drop the zombie (or ogre zombie) to 0 HP with ordinary weapon damage and watch Undead Fortitude roll a CON save (DC 5 + the damage dealt) to lurch back up at 1 HP — then finish it with a critical or with radiant damage (Brother Aldric's spells), which the trait can't resist. Stand next to a mephit when it dies and watch its Death Burst force a save on everyone within range (it hits friend and foe alike): the steam/magma mephits deal damage, while the dust mephit's burst blinds instead (with a save each turn to recover). Two mephits set side by side will chain-detonate.
